2606.30951.title: Learning Where to Look: A Reinforcement Learning Framework for Robust Micro-Ultrasound Prostate Cancer Detection
2606.30951.paper_summary: Micro-ultrasound ($μ$US) is a new, emerging, and promising imaging modality for prostate cancer (PCa) detection, but accurate identification of suspicious tissue remains highly dependent on clinical experience, leading to substantial inter-observer variability. Machine-learning assistance can reduce this variability; however, training reliable deep models is challenging because supervision is sparse and noisy -- typically limited to core-level histopathology outcomes (e.g., cancer grade and its percentage in a biopsy core) without pixel-level lesion annotations and under severe class imbalance. We introduce Prost-RL, which reframes $μ$US PCa detection as a spatially aware, policy-driven inference problem by learning where to look before decoding. Prost-RL integrates a lightweight reinforcement-learning policy into a foundation-model encoder-decoder to generate interpretable spatial attention maps that act as soft prompts for both cancer-likelihood heatmap prediction and image-level classification. We further propose Adaptive Policy Optimization (APO) to stabilize hybrid supervised-RL training and a noise-robust objective combining symmetric cross-entropy with negative-entropy regularization to mitigate weak-label noise and encourage sharp localization. On a cohort of 6,607 biopsy cores from 693 patients across five clinical sites, Prost-RL achieves $79.0\pm3.5$ AUROC with $64.6\pm6.3$% sensitivity at 80% specificity for core-level detection (+2.1 AUROC and +4.5 sensitivity points over the strongest baseline), and $79.3\pm5.8$ AUROC for clinically significant cancer classification. The learned policy highlights biopsy-aligned regions, providing transparent, spatially grounded evidence alongside quantitative risk predictions. Code is available at: https://github.com/DeepRCL/Prost-RL.
2606.30951.paper_summary_zh: 微超聲波 ($μ$US) 是一種新興且有前景的前列腺癌 (PCa) 檢測影像技術，但對可疑組織的準確識別仍然高度依賴臨床經驗，導致觀察者之間存在顯著的變異性。機器學習的輔助可以減少這種變異性；然而，訓練可靠的深度模型具有挑戰性，因為監督稀疏且噪聲較多——通常僅限於核心級別的組織病理結果（例如，癌症分級及其在活檢核心中的百分比），而缺乏像素級的病變標註，且存在嚴重的類別不平衡。我們提出了 Prost-RL，將 $μ$US 前列腺癌檢測重新框架為一個空間感知的、基於策略的推斷問題，通過學習在解碼之前應該關注的地方。Prost-RL 將輕量級的強化學習策略整合到基礎模型的編碼器-解碼器中，以生成可解釋的空間注意力圖，作為癌症可能性熱圖預測和圖像級分類的軟提示。我們進一步提出了自適應策略優化 (APO)，以穩定混合監督強化學習訓練，並結合對稱交叉熵和負熵正則化的抗噪聲目標，以減輕弱標籤噪聲並促進精確定位。在來自五個臨床中心的693名患者的6,607個活檢核心的隊列中，Prost-RL 在核心級檢測中達到 $79.0\pm3.5$ AUROC，並在80%特異性下具有 $64.6\pm6.3$% 的敏感性（比最強基線提高 +2.1 AUROC 和 +4.5 敏感性點），對於臨床顯著的癌症分類則達到 $79.3\pm5.8$ AUROC。學習到的策略突出了與活檢對齊的區域，提供了透明的、基於空間的證據，並伴隨定量風險預測。代碼可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/DeepRCL/Prost-RL。
2606.30951.author: Mohammad Mahdi Abootorabi et.al.
2606.30951.authors: Mohammad Mahdi Abootorabi, Sina Namazi, Armin Saadat, Lyuyang Wang, Obed Dzikunu, Paul F. R. Wilson, Zhuoxin Guo, Brian Wodlinger, Parvin Mousavi, Purang Abolmaesumi
